summary: Made MCP research/search guidance live-first with targeted local caching instead of sync-first.
reason: EverBee tools should use current live API data for requested research slices, storing returned evidence locally for repeated analysis without bulk-syncing all records.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/mcp ./internal/cli, go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., and git diff --check passed.
